verdict_oos: Insufficient bucket coverage (need >=3 populated buckets for trend test).
verdict_legacy: Insufficient sample in one or both buckets — run a longer/larger backtest.
warnings: Survivorship bias: universe is built from current-snapshot ticker lists. Stocks that delisted, went bankrupt, or were acquired before today are excluded entirely — results are biased upward by an unknown amount (typically 1-3%/yr for large-cap windows, more for small-cap or longer windows).
Skipped 51 potential entries due to earnings within ±3 days.
